subject: WM-0081 review: changes_requested
body: Blocking scope issue: WM-0081 modifies tools/sim-replay-diagnostics-lib.mjs and tools/sim-replay-test.mjs, but the task allowedPaths only authorize tools/test-runner.mjs and tools/headless-runner/src/index.ts under tools. Update task ownership/allowed paths or move the replay CLI changes into authorized scope before verification.
